raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es fazziju pehz ka winſch
ſcho wiſſu bij darrijs: Atgree-
ſees pee mannim/ bet winſch ne
atgreeſahs. Scho redſeja ta ne-us-
tizzama winna Mahſa Juhta;
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es redſeju/ ka es wiſſu
to Leetu deht/ ar ko taſ pahr-
kahpajs Israëls to Laulibu bij
pahrlausijs/ winnu bij attahjis/
un weenu Schkirſchanas-Grah-
matu winnam dewis/ ka tomehr
ta ne-ustizzama winna Mahſa
Juhta ne bihajahs/ bet nogah-
je/ un dſinne patti arridsan
Mauzibu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un no tahs Slawaſ win-
nas Mauzibas irr winna to
Semni tagahniſti/ jo winna
pahrlausiſa to Laulibu ar Akini-
nein un Kohkeim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wiſſas fchinnis Leetâs
arridsan ne irr winna ne-ustiz-
zama Mahſa Juhta pee man-
nim atgreeſufeſs no wiſſas fauas
Sir̈ds/ bet ar Wiltu / faſſa taſ
KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un taſ KUNGS fazzija
uhs manni: Tas atkahpajs I-
ſraëls iſturrahs taifnaſt/ neka ta
ne-ustizzama Juhta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Eij / un iſſanz ſchoſs
Wahrdus prett Seemeta-Puffi/
un faſſi: Atgreeſees tu atkah-
pajs Israëls/ faſſa taſ KUNGS:
Tad ne liſſchu es fauſ Dufini-
bu uhs tevi kriſt. Jo es eſmu
ſcheſligs/ faſſa taſ KUNGS: Es
ve gribbu muhſchigi duſmotees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Atſihſti tilſcai tawn N
ſeequimu/ ka tu prett to KUN-
tawu Deewu eſti pahrkahpis/
eſſi ſchurp un turp ſkraidis p
Swescheim / appaſch itkat-
sakta Rohka/ bet mannai Balktu
juhs ne eſſat paſlautigi bijutcb
faſſa taſ KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Atgreeſeeteſ juhs atkah-
vaji Behrni/ faſſa taſ KUNGS
Jo es eſmu juhs prezzejs/ un ue-
xemſchu juhs/ weenu no ween
Pilsfahta/ un diwi no weena
Zilts/ un wediſchu juhs uh-
Zianu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es dohſchu juhs Ban-
nus pehz manna Prahta / te-
gannihs juhs ar Siunaſchanu
un Sapraſchanu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad juhs buhſeet twa-
rojschees un auglojschees ta-
Seumê/ tannis Deenâs/ faſſa
taſ KUNGS/ ne fazzihu wairs:
Ta KUNga Derribas-Schkirſts;
wisch arri Prahta wairs ne-
nahks/ un wisch arri ne taps
wairs peeininnehts/ ned̈s peeinek-
lehts/ wisch arri ne taps atka-
padaſſihts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tanni Laikâ tap̈s Jeru-
saleme noſaukta ta KUNGA
Gohda-Krehſlis/ un pee winnas
taps wiſſi Pagani ſapulzinati/ta
KUNGA Wahrdâ deht eekſch
Jeruſalemes/ un tee ne staigahs
wairs pehz fauas niknas Sir̈ds
Dohnahin.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tannis Deenâs eeſ tas
Nains Juhta pee ta Israëta
Namuna/ un tee nahes lohpa is
tahs
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
